prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第134名，近年排名在134–162名之间波动，整体处于中后段211水平；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线下降舆情），2023年偏正面（食堂宿舍获好评）；抖音综合热度排名第86位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考热度信号；畜牧学A、作物学A-，与该校农林特色一致，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 农林类相关专业社会热度总体平稳；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次63021名、2026年计划小幅缩招2人（竞争加剧）、广东省物理类考生增加约1.6万人（竞争加剧）以及声誉热度平稳等因素，预计2026年录取位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约62146名，区间61646–62646名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 42006 → 43102 → 69390 → 60376 → 63021. A significant gap occurred in 2023, followed by a recovery in 2024, and a slight decline of about 2645 places in 2025, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 63021. Enrollment was 73 in both 2021 and 2022, expanded to 103 in 2023, 105 in 2024, and 112 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 110, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.8%, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 134th, fluctuating between 134 and 162 in recent years, overall at a mid-to-lower level among 211 universities. In 2022, reputation was neutral/mixed (due to negative news about admission score drops), while in 2023 it was somewhat positive (positive reviews of canteens and dormitories). On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranking is 86th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no clear surge in application interest. Animal Science is rated A, Crop Science A-, consistent with the university's agricultural and forestry characteristics, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of agriculture and forestry-related majors is generally stable. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 63021, a slight reduction of 2 places in the 2026 plan (intensified competition), an increase of about 16,000 Physics Category examinees in Guangdong (intensified competition), and stable reputation and popularity, the 2026 admission ranking is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 62146, with a range of 61646 to 62646.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 61646–62646, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 61500), prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (above 62600), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.
